PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARBELOUS INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTELLI GENA COSTELLI VICTOR $672.87 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $688.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
